branch.branch_summary: Run a runtime-backed v8.1 direction review before opening the first provider adapter governance implementation task.

tree_answer.where_are_we: The runtime is between v8.0 and the next concrete branch.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Prepare v8.1 External Reference And Provider Adapter Governance: provider adapters become governed access paths with explicit read/write authority, freshness checks, approval policy gates, side-effect boundaries, and external-write escalation.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Run a runtime-backed direction review before opening the next implementation task: Run a runtime-backed v8.1 direction review before opening the first provider adapter governance implementation task.
